summary: Executed backend pytest and frontend Playwright e2e for requested CRM flows using public URL; all tested flows passed.
action_items: Optional: fix login brand typo from 'CCRM' to 'CRM'.
Optional: split backend/server.py into smaller modules (currently very large).
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is >900 lines; split by domain (auth, leads, stages, sheets) for maintainability.
Passwords are stored and compared in plain text; use secure hashing before production rollout.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST/AUTO entities during tests (branch, users, stages, leads) via API/UI flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Core end-to-end flow is green on public URL; Google Sheets shows disconnected pending OAuth keys message as expected without keys.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional issue reproduced in this iteration.
